task_completion.description: Open the Currency Rate window and initiate a new record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The iDempiere 'Currency Rate' window is open and a blank or new record form is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Set the source and target currencies
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Currency' (or Currency From) field is set to 'EUR' and the 'Currency To' field is set to 'USD'.

task_completion.description: Set the conversion type to Spot
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Currency Type' or 'Conversion Type' dropdown/lookup field is set to 'Spot'.

task_completion.description: Set the Valid From and Valid To dates for the year 2025
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Valid from' field contains '2025-01-01' (or equivalent date format for Jan 1, 2025) and the 'Valid to' field contains '2025-12-31' (or equivalent date format for Dec 31, 2025).
The 'Multiply Rate' field contains the value '1.085' or '1.085000'.

task_completion.description: Save the new currency rate record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The record appears saved, indicated by a disabled/greyed-out save button, a 'Saved' status message in the bottom bar, or the new record appearing in the grid/table view.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere web GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show interaction with the actual iDempiere web interface in a browser, not terminal commands, scripts, or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify answers are not just typed into a text editor
integrity.visual_evidence: The currency codes, dates, and rates are entered directly into the iDempiere form fields, not written in a notepad, text editor, or separate document.

integrity.description: Verify the task is performed in the GardenWorld client
integrity.visual_evidence: The iDempiere interface indicates the agent is working within the 'GardenWorld' client (typically visible in the top right user menu, header, or bottom status bar).

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for verification: 1. Currency From: EUR (Euro). 2. Currency To: USD (US Dollar). 3. Currency Type: Spot. 4. Multiply Rate: 1.085 (accept 1.085000, tolerance +/- 0.001). 5. Valid From: 2025-01-01. 6. Valid To: 2025-12-31. All data must be entered in the iDempiere Currency Rate window.
